title: pi-corp — What's Next?
description: 18 commits, 6.2k lines, never run live. Here's the honest priority list.

questions.question: What do you want to do first?
options: Boot it up: /reload then /corp-agency then /corp-go live test
Ship something real: build Wael's actual agency website
Test the sales machine: add real prospects, send real emails
Dashboard demo: generate HTML dashboard, open in browser
Fix fragile stuff first: Windows test, Bun.spawn, real execution
questions.recommended: Boot it up: /reload then /corp-agency then /corp-go live test
questions.context: You have 6.2k lines of untested code. The most valuable thing is to see if it actually works.
